name: Final Score
query:
SELECT
  COALESCE(t.participants.purple_agent, t.participants.white_agent) AS id,
  r.unnest.final.normalized_score AS "Final Score"
FROM results t
CROSS JOIN UNNEST(t.results) AS r
WHERE r.unnest.task_id = 't002_hyy_v5_l1'
  AND r.unnest.final.normalized_score IS NOT NULL;

name: Hard Check Pass Rate
query:
SELECT
  COALESCE(t.participants.purple_agent, t.participants.white_agent) AS id,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN r.unnest.hard_checks_passed THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100, 1) AS "Hard Check Pass %"
FROM results t
CROSS JOIN UNNEST(t.results) AS r
WHERE r.unnest.task_id = 't002_hyy_v5_l1'
GROUP BY id;

name: Execution
query:
SELECT
  COALESCE(t.participants.purple_agent, t.participants.white_agent) AS id,
  r.unnest.dimension_scores.execution AS "Execution"
FROM results t
CROSS JOIN UNNEST(t.results) AS r
WHERE r.unnest.task_id = 't002_hyy_v5_l1'
  AND r.unnest.dimension_scores.execution IS NOT NULL;
